title: specularia parviflora subsp. balearica
intro: Specularia parviflora subsp. balearica, also known as the Balearic glossina, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, characterized by its small, white, and fragrant flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Specularia parviflora subsp. balearica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infusion, or dried and used as a powder to be added to other medicinal blends.
